message:
test(bench): pass --no-rch to orchestrate helper to skip remote compilation in tests

The bench schema integration test was failing when rch (remote
compilation host) was unavailable. Add --no-rch flag to the fake
toolchain orchestration call so tests run with local compilation
only, matching the test's intent of validating schema correctness
rather than remote build infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
